Los Recibos / The Receipts

Proof, Not Promises

Hot 97 · NYC Radio

Funk Flex Premiere

Radio legend Funk Flex premiered "We On Top" on Hot 97. If you know NYC rap, you know what that stamp means.

BlockWork TV · First

1st Colombian Rapper Featured

First Colombian rapper ever featured on BlockWork TV. Watch the "Killen Em" performance below.

82nd St · Jackson Heights

Calle Colombia Headliner

Headlined the Calle Colombia Festival on the block that carries the flag — Calle Colombia Way, Queens.

El Contenido / The Stream

La Historia / The Story

De Colombia
a Queens

ENY The Artist raps, writes, and streams out of Jackson Heights, Queens — a few blocks from the street sign that reads Calle Colombia Way. Colombian blood, New York bars, and a sound he calls The New Vintage: boom-bap bones, present-day pen.

Three albums deep. A Funk Flex premiere on Hot 97. A first-ever Colombian feature on BlockWork TV. A headline set at the Calle Colombia Festival. And a live stream where the music gets made in front of you.

Hip hop artist. Songwriter. Future Grammy award winner. Hecho en Queens. Sangre colombiana.

More story coming soon. For now — press play.
